SEARCH

Package product

package product
It includes everything product-unique. The store has two types of products: new and secondhand products. Secondhand products are uploaded by registered clients and can be exchanged with other registered clients. New products are sold in the store and can be either comics, figurines or games.

Secondhand products possess a conservation status and a valuation which is assigned by an employee with an exchange permission, in order to exchange them one must launch an offer.

Games can be of four different styles: cards, dice, gameboard and miniature. Furthermore, new products can be contained in packs which are a group of products that sell for a lower price than the sum of its contents' prices. Discounts can be applied to both packs and store products.

Version:
3.5.
Author:
Ana O.R., Sofía C.L. and Duna P.R.
  • Class
    Description
    Category
    It implements the categories
    Comic
    It implements the comic store product type
    ComposedPack
    It implements the composed packs
    ConservationStatus
    It defines the conservations status
    Figurine
    It implements the figurines
    Game
    It implements the game store product type
    GameStyle
    It defines the game's possible styles
    Pack
    It implements the packs
    Product
    It implements the abstract Product class
    ProductType
    It defines the store product types
    Review
    It implements the reviews
    SecondHandProduct
    It implements the second-hand products
    SimplePack
    It implements the simple packs
    StoreProduct
    It implements the store's products
